lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior and interior show significant wear and damage. Mechanical components require major repairs and are not fully functional.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant rust and body damage. The interior shows heavy wear and tears in the upholstery. Mechanical components require repair for reliable operation.
Mint condition.

This vehicle is in mint, showroom-quality condition and has been meticulously maintained by its single owner. The exterior paint is flawless, with a deep, mirror-like finish and absolutely no scratches, chips, or dents. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the leather upholstery remains supple and free of any wear, and all electronic features and controls function perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in peak performance, having been exclusively garage-kept and serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule. A buyer can expect a vehicle that looks and drives as if it were brand new, with a complete service history included for peace of mind.

Calling all DIY enthusiasts and project seekers! This car is a fantastic opportunity for someone looking for a budget-friendly fixer-upper or a reliable source for parts. While it requires significant mechanical attention and cosmetic TLC to get back in top shape, its potential is clear for the right owner ready to roll up their sleeves!

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, appearing and driving as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless, retaining a deep, factory-fresh luster with no chips, scratches, or imperfections of any kind. Inside, the interior is pristine, with high-quality materials showing zero signs of wear, and every electronic feature and safety system functioning perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in peak performance; the engine runs exceptionally smooth and quiet, and the transmission shifts with precision. It has been meticulously maintained with a full service history and has always been stored in a climate-controlled garage. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that has been preserved in top-tier, like-new condition.

We are pleased to present this distinguished vehicle, representing an exceptional balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained and rigorously inspected, this automobile offers a refined driving experience and proven mechanical integrity. Its sophisticated profile and reliable history make it a premier choice for the discerning driver seeking quality without compromise.

Hey everyone! I'm selling my trusty car and it's honestly such a gem. It’s in really wonderful shape and has been super dependable for me. It drives like a dream and is ready to hit the road with a new owner! I’ve taken great care of it, so you’re getting a fantastic deal on a solid ride. Shoot me a message if you’re interested!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54B32 power plant, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a high-revving valvetrain equipped with double-VANOS variable valve timing. The 6-speed Getrag manual transmission offers precise mechanical engagement, paired with a factory-spec M-Variable differential lock for optimal torque distribution. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from a reinforced rear subframe and refreshed bushings to maintain suspension geometry under load. While the exterior displays an honest patina consistent with its driver-focused history, the mechanical integrity is paramount, featuring a recently serviced cooling system and shim-and-bucket valve adjustment. A pure driver’s machine with exceptional turn-in response and a visceral exhaust note.

This 2018 Lexus RX 350 is a well-maintained, reliable SUV that strikes a perfect balance between luxury and daily utility. The Nebula Gray Pearl exterior retains a high-gloss finish, though close inspection reveals minor stone chips on the hood and a small scuff on the rear bumper from standard use. Inside, the cabin is smoke-free and features black leather seating that remains supple, with only light creasing on the driver’s side bolster. All premium features, including the heated and ventilated seats, power moonroof, and navigation system, are fully operational. Mechanically, the vehicle is in excellent health with a complete dealership service history; we recently completed an oil change and a full multi-point inspection. The tires have ample tread remaining, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. This is a clean, honest vehicle that has been cared for meticulously and is ready for many more miles of comfortable driving.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive engineering, maintained to a commendable standard. This vehicle offers a harmonious balance of performance and reliability, ensuring a superior driving experience for its next owner. Thoroughly inspected to meet our rigorous criteria for mechanical integrity and aesthetic presentation, it stands as a premier choice for the sophisticated motorist seeking an optimal blend of value and excellence.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Characterized by a robust powertrain and a refined interior, the automobile has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and sustained performance. Its sophisticated profile is supported by a consistent service history, affirming a legacy of diligent ownership. We invite you to experience the seamless fusion of reliability and prestige that defines this exceptional offering.

This exceptionally well-maintained vehicle offers a perfect blend of reliability and modern comfort. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous finish with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful use. Inside, the smoke-free cabin features premium upholstery in excellent shape, a responsive touchscreen interface, and dual-zone climate control that functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is robust; it comes with a documented service history, including a recent professional inspection, fluid flush, and a fresh set of high-performance all-season tires. The engine delivers smooth power while the suspension remains tight and quiet over bumps. This is a turn-key opportunity for a buyer seeking a dependable, high-quality ride without the new-car price tag.

This meticulously maintained sedan represents the ideal balance of performance and everyday utility. The exterior finish remains vibrant and glossy, showing only the minor, expected signs of careful road use, such as light stone chips on the lower valance. Inside, the cabin is a testament to pride of ownership; the premium leather seating is supple and intact, while the dashboard and touchpoints remain free of sun damage or excessive wear. Every feature, from the heated seats to the premium audio system, operates flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs quiet and strong, backed by a comprehensive service history that includes a recent fluid flush and a new set of high-performance tires. This car delivers a smooth, confident ride with crisp handling, making it a reliable and sophisticated choice for its next owner.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating a refined aesthetic and robust mechanical integrity, the automobile has been curated to ensure a superior standard of reliability and performance. Its history of consistent care is evident in both its structural composure and interior preservation. We invite you to acquire a vehicle that exemplifies professional standards and enduring value.
